string-array.name: whats_new_items
string-array.item: Per-tool ad unlocks (24h) — fairer than all-or-nothing
One-time 3-day Pro trial via a single ad
App Resource Report — one honest score per app, find the hogs
Storage Forecast — predicts when your storage will run out
Focus / Game Boost — DND-managed focus sessions
App Lock (Pro) and encrypted Cloud Backup (Pro)
